title: stellaria lanceolata
intro: Stellaria lanceolata, also known as prickly starwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stellaria lanceolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various infections. In herbal preparations, Stellaria lanceolata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
